title: OpenAI's $280 Billion Revenue Forecast for 2030
text: OpenAI anticipates revenue exceeding $280 billion by 2030. Company demonstrated momentum in 2025: CFO Sarah Friar revealed annualized revenue topped $20 billion in 2025 (up from $6 billion prior year). Projections driven by multiple income streams including subscription AI software sales and advertising pilots within platform. Company projects $600 billion infrastructure spending by 2030 on data centers, chips, and technology. Completing first phase new funding round expected to bring $100 billion+, with company valuation potentially exceeding $850 billion.
